{"fixed_xml":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <ADVERTISMENT>
        <TEXT>In denen Thurneysischen Buchlden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgelffert:</TEXT>
        <BIBLIOGRAPHY>
            <ENTRY>
                <AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR>
                <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>
                <EDITOR>Ant. Birrius</EDITOR>
                <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
            </ENTRY>
            <ENTRY>
                <TITLE>T. Lilius e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Norit</TITLE>
                <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME>
                <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
                <PAPER_TYPE>schn Schreib-Median-Pappier</PAPER_TYPE>
                <PRICE>
                    <AMOUNT>fl. 6.</AMOUNT>
                    <DURATION>kbanfftige Wochen</DURATION>
                </PRICE>
                <VALIDITY>
                    <DURATION>nur bis Ende Januarii</DURATION>
                    <YEAR>1740</YEAR>
                </VALIDITY>
                <CONDITION>
                    <PRICE>kein Exemplar unter fl. 7fl. 30. xr.</PRICE>
                    <DURATION>nach welcher Zeit</DURATION>
                </CONDITION>
            </ENTRY>
        </BIBLIOGRAPHY>
    </ADVERTISMENT>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":10,"explanation":"1. Added XML declaration.
2. Wrapped the content in a logical structure with `<ADVERTISMENT>` and `<TEXT>` tags for the introductory sentence.
3. Split the `<BIBL>` tag into a structured `<BIBLIOGRAPHY>` with multiple `<ENTRY>` tags for each bibliographic item.
4. Separated the second author (`Ant. Birrius`) into an `<EDITOR>` tag.
5. Added `<PAPER_TYPE>` tag for the paper description.
6. Structured the price information into `<PRICE>` with `<AMOUNT>` and `<DURATION>` sub-tags.
7. Added `<VALIDITY>` section to specify the time frame for the price.
8. Added `<CONDITION>` section to clarify the terms after the validity period.
9. Fixed and normalized special characters (e.g., `` for non-breaking characters).
10. Ensured proper nesting and hierarchy of tags for semantic clarity."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ITEM>
    <ADVERTISMENT>
        <TEXT>In denen Thurneysischen Buchlden allhier werden die ersten zwey Theile von folgendem Werck denen Herren Subseribenten ausgelffert:</TEXT>
        <BIBLIOGRAPHY>
            <ENTRY>
                <AUTHOR>Roberti Stephani</AUTHOR>
                <TITLE>Thesaurus Linguae Latinae post noviss. Londin. edit. insignitor auctam Annokationibus Honrici Stephani Locupletatus</TITLE>
                <EDITOR>Ant. Birrius</EDITOR>
                <FORMAT>fol.</FORMAT>
            </ENTRY>
            <ENTRY>
                <TITLE>T. Lilius e. Integr. Sigonii & Gronovior Norit</TITLE>
                <VOLUME>3. Voll.</VOLUME>
                <FORMAT>8.</FORMAT>
                <PAPER_TYPE>schn Schreib-Median-Pappier</PAPER_TYPE>
                <PRICE>
                    <AMOUNT>fl. 6.</AMOUNT>
                    <DURATION>kbanfftige Wochen</DURATION>
                </PRICE>
                <VALIDITY>
                    <DURATION>nur bis Ende Januarii</DURATION>
                    <YEAR>1740</YEAR>
                </VALIDITY>
                <CONDITION>
                    <PRICE>kein Exemplar unter fl. 7fl. 30. xr.</PRICE>
                    <DURATION>nach welcher Zeit</DURATION>
                </CONDITION>
            </ENTRY>
        </BIBLIOGRAPHY>
    </ADVERTISMENT>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Added XML declaration.
2. Wrapped the content in a logical structure with `<ADVERTISMENT>` and `<TEXT>` tags for the introductory sentence.
3. Split the `<BIBL>` tag into a structured `<BIBLIOGRAPHY>` with multiple `<ENTRY>` tags for each bibliographic item.
4. Separated the second author (`Ant. Birrius`) into an `<EDITOR>` tag.
5. Added `<PAPER_TYPE>` tag for the paper description.
6. Structured the price information into `<PRICE>` with `<AMOUNT>` and `<DURATION>` sub-tags.
7. Added `<VALIDITY>` section to specify the time frame for the price.
8. Added `<CONDITION>` section to clarify the terms after the validity period.
9. Fixed and normalized special characters (e.g., `` for non-breaking characters).
10. Ensured proper nesting and hierarchy of tags for semantic clarity.
